message:
fix: accessibility, Netlify timeouts, CronJob card, and Copilot review items (#7816)

- BaseModal: add aria-labelledby linking dialog to title element (#7809)
- UserProfileDropdown: add aria-expanded/aria-haspopup/aria-controls (#7810)
- CreateDashboardModal: add htmlFor/id associations for form inputs (#7811)
- Input.tsx: add aria-describedby for error messages (#7812)
- Pagination: link "Per page" label to select via htmlFor/id (#7813)
- bonus-points.mts: add AbortController timeout to GitHub API fetch (#7804)
- affiliate-clicks.mts: wrap JSON.parse of service account in try/catch (#7805)
- youtube-thumbnail.mts: add AbortController timeout to CDN fetch (#7806)
- cronjob-status config: remove hardcoded isDemoData:true that caused
  Demo badge to always show regardless of live data (#7791)
- App.tsx: extract prefetch timeout to named constant, clear timer when
  fetchEnabledDashboards resolves first (#7792)
- find-and-search.spec.ts: remove unused collectConsoleErrors import (#7772)

Fixes #7804, #7805, #7806, #7809, #7810, #7811, #7812, #7813, #7791, #7792, #7772

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

         className="flex items-center gap-2 border-l border-border hover:bg-secondary rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 h-9 transition-colors"
       >
         {user.avatar_url ? (

           {/* Header with avatar and name */}
           <div className="p-4 bg-secondary border-b border-border">
             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
